prompt.asset_type: dashboard hero image for a game theme
prompt.primary_request: Create an original Creature Academy arena hero image for a Splendor-inspired multiplayer board-game dashboard.
prompt.scene: A bright academy hall opening into an elemental arena with five training zones for fire, water, grass, electric, and psychic energy, gemstone tokens, and polished card-table surfaces.
prompt.constraints: Original creature designs only; no official Pokemon characters, official silhouettes, logos, trademarks, readable text, or watermark.
